What is the capacity of FHP1412Z9B LG washing machine model? Q. How does AI DD® work in a washing machine? The AI DD® (Artificial Intelligence Direct Drive) technology incorporates smart sensors and AI, enabling an enhanced washing process in washing machines. It analyzes the laundry load and automatically selects appropriate washing motions for improved cleaning while minimizing clothing wear. Weight Detection : The washing machine first measures the weight of the laundry loaded into the drum. This enables the AI DD® technology to understand the load size and prepare itself for an efficient washing process. Fabric Softness Detection : Once it has detected the weight, it measures the fabric softness. This enables the machine to recognize the various fabrics and treat them with appropriate care based on their material composition.

AI Data Reference : The AI system compares the detected load data with a database of wash motions to identify the most appropriate washing pattern. Optimal Wash Motion Selection : Based on this analysis, the machine automatically selects the best wash motion to provide thorough cleaning while helping minimize clothing wear. *AI DD® available for Cotton, Easy Care and Mixed Fabric cycles only. Turbo Wash 360° technology assists a washing machine in cleaning clothes more quickly while ensuring that washing is effective. It is designed to deliver efficient washing by optimizing water movement and spray coverage inside the drum. The water circulates from multiple angles, so detergent and water reach clothes more evenly. This enhances stain removal and ensures clothes are washed properly within a shorter cycle. TurboWash 360° is also designed with efficiency in mind, helping reduce water and energy usage during each wash. By improving how water flows and spreads through the load, the machine can maintain effective cleaning while using few resources. As a result, users can experience faster laundry cycles, reliable cleaning performance, and a more eco-conscious washing process that supports both convenience and energy efficiency.

*Tested by Intertek, based on IEC 60456 : edition 5.0. TurboWash39 cycle with 5kg of IEC load compared to Conventional Cotton Cycle with TurboWash. The Steam+ technology helps to enhance the wash process by using steam to improve the hygiene and care of the clothes. It helps eliminate common allergens and, at the same time, removes wrinkles from the washed clothes. This helps the clothes feel fresh and maintained after the wash process. Improved Hygiene : The Steam+ technology helps eliminate 99.9% of viruses and allergens, keeping clothes clean and safe for daily use. Allergen Reduction : This technology helps eliminate allergens such as dust mites, which are known to cause allergies and respiratory issues. Fewer Wrinkles : Steam+ technology helps eliminate wrinkles on clothes by up to 30%. This helps the clothes look fresh after the washing process.

Better Fabric Care : Gentle steam penetration helps refresh fabrics without harsh mechanical action. What is the color of LG Washing Machine model FHB1207Z2W? The LG Washing Machine model FHB1207Z2W comes in a White color. Q. How does the direct drive motor reduce vibration and noise? The direct drive motor is designed to provide a smoother and quieter washing experience. Its smart design reduces internal movement, helping the machine run with less vibration and noise . The benefits of using a direct drive motor include: ● Direct Connection Design: The motor is directly connected to the drum, reducing unnecessary belts and extra components that usually cause vibration and sound.

● Lower Noise Levels: With few moving parts and less friction, the machine works more quietly, making it comfortable for daily use. ● Enhanced Stability: Reduced vibration keeps the machine steady, even during high-speed spinning cycles. ● Improved Durability: Less mechanical stress helps to increase the life of internal parts. ● 10-Year Warranty: Backed by a standard 10-year warranty on the motor and parts for added peace of mind. *10 Year warranty is only applicable on Motor. Q. How does steam help in removing allergens from clothes? Steam helps to remove allergens from clothes by using high-temperature moisture that penetrates deep into fabrics during the wash cycle. The heat and steam action help loosen and reduce common allergens like dust particles and residue trapped within fibers, resulting in better hygiene and improved fabric cleanliness. This process also supports gentle yet effective cleaning without harsh mechanical action, which is essential for everyday laundry needs.

What is 6 Motion Direct Drive technology? 6 Motion Direct Drive technology is an advanced washing system that is designed to provide complete care for all fabric types. The technology incorporates six special drum movements to improve the washing process by maintaining fabric protection and efficiency. ● Stepping : Minimizes tangling of clothes by lifting and dropping them gently. It helps to reduce wrinkles and supports balanced washing performance. ● Filtration : Improves water flow in the drum, allows better detergent mixing, and provides more effective removal of dirt particles. ● Scrubbing : Uses dynamic motion to remove tough stains, improving overall cleaning results.

● Tumble : Rotates clothes evenly for consistent wash coverage and efficient cleaning performance. ● Rolling : Provides smooth drum movement to protect delicate fabrics from damage. ● Swing : Gently moves garments back and forth, offering enhanced care for sensitive materials. Q. How does steam help in removing allergens from clothes? Steam assists in the removal of allergens from clothes by penetrating deep into the fabric of the clothes and loosening trapped particles during the wash cycle. The high-temperature steam process helps in better hygiene by focusing on common allergens like dust residue and other microscopic irritants that may be presented on garments. Allergy Removal with Steam enhances overall cleanliness by combining heat and moisture to improve fabric freshness and washing performance. The steam process is effective for all types of fabrics, which helps in maintaining the hygiene of the garments while washing. Air Conditioners Accessories All Air Conditioners Accessories Air Purifiers Accessories All Air Purifiers Accessories Signage Accessories All Signage Accessories Dishwashers Accessories All Dishwashers Accessories LG Air purifiers for cleaner breathing air Reduce the presence of allergens in your home, and enjoy cleaner breathing air with LG's powerful, silent and beautifully designed air purifiers. Find out more below. Free Filter with every Air Purifier 360 Hit Frequently Asked Question on Air Purifiers Q. Does LG make air purifiers for all needs? In light of the escalating pollution worldwide, the demand for air purification has become increasingly urgent. Recognizing this necessity, LG, an internationally renowned brand, developed diverse air pollution solutions tailored to different customer requirements. In response to this demand, air purifiers became imperative. Our range of air purifiers incorporates advanced attributes such as comprehensive 360-degree purification, an intelligent PM 1.0 sensor and display, and a multi-filtration system. These combined features position our air purifiers as the optimal choice.

Q. What are the best features of LG Air Purifiers? As the Air Quality Index (AQI) continues to rise, LG Air Purifiers have been engineered and designed to cater to modern environments where people grapple with challenges stemming from pollution. LG air purifiers are instilled with multiple features such as: • 360˚ Purification: LG's "360˚ Purification" is a feature in select air purifiers that draws in air from all sides, enhancing filtration efficiency. It processes air through multiple filters to comprehensively remove pollutants, providing thorough air purification for improved indoor air quality. • Multi-Filtration System: Multi-Filtration System is a thorough air cleaning process using multiple filters to remove various particles and pollutants, ensuring fresher air indoors. The Multi-filtration process eliminates 99.9% of bacteria and viruses, 99.999% of dust, allergens, and harmful gases, such as bad odours and smog.

• PM 1.0 Smart Sensor & Indicator: It detects ultra-fine particles, indicating air quality. Users can check the air quality at a glance with a colour-coded indicator based on the PM 1.0 sensor detecting system. The PuriCare™ 360 HIT air purifier automatically detects the indoor air condition and marks it on the indicator on the side of the machine in four colours: red, orange, yellow, or green. • LG ThinQ™: The Smart technology allows users to connect their purifier to their phone, letting them control and monitor air quality from anywhere. • Compact in Size: The space-saving design of LG Air Purifiers fits well in any room, making it convenient to place and use while effectively purifying the air. Despite their compact size, these air purifiers have a wide coverage area. Q. What is the concept of the PM 1.0 Smart Sensor and Indicators? The PM 1.0 Smart Sensor and Indicators in air purifiers represent an advanced monitoring system. PM 1.0 refers to particulate matter as tiny as 1.0 micrometres, which can contain harmful pollutants. The smart sensor detects these ultra-fine particles, assessing indoor air quality in real time.

The indicators then communicate this information through visual cues, often colour-coded displays or lights. Green indicates good air quality, while transitioning to yellow and red suggests declining quality. These indicators prompt timely actions—like adjusting purifier settings or improving ventilation—to maintain a healthier environment. Overall this technology provides valuable insights into air quality, fostering proactive steps for better indoor living conditions. Q. Can I connect my air purifier to my phone using Wi-Fi? Yes, users can connect the LG Air Purifiers to their phones through Wi-Fi using LG ThinQ app. With this app, you can connect to LG PuriCare™ Air purifiers remotely. The solution-oriented technology makes operation swift and ensures you come home to a clean & fresh environment. It's important to have a stable & reliable Wi-Fi network to ensure that your LG smart devices and the LG ThinQ app can communicate effectively. If your Wi-Fi network experiences connectivity issues, it could impact your ability to control and manage your devices using the app.

Q. Do I need an air purifier if my air quality is clean? Air purifiers are primarily used to improve indoor air quality by removing pollutants, allergens, and other contaminants from the air. Air quality can fluctuate due to a range of factors, including seasonal shifts, outdoor pollution, indoor activities, and the presence of potential allergens. Even in generally good environments, air purifiers can offer benefits by further enhancing air quality and reducing allergens, odours, & airborne particles. Assess your specific needs, potential triggers for health issues, and preferences before deciding whether an air purifier is necessary for your home. However, if your air quality is consistently good and meets health and comfort standards, you might not necessarily need an air purifier. Q. Is it good to use an air purifier every day? Yes, using an air purifier every day can be beneficial, especially if you want to maintain consistently good indoor air quality. Air purifiers are designed to remove pollutants, allergens, and particles from the air, which can help create a healthier and more comfortable living environment.

Regular use can be helpful for individuals with allergies, respiratory issues, or sensitivity to airborne irritants. The effectiveness of an air purifier depends on factors like the type of purifier, the size of the room, the specific pollutants you are targeting, and the purifier's specifications. LG Air Purifiers have a multi-filtration system to ensure that you get only pure air to breathe. LG ThinQ connectivity makes controls and operations smooth & hassle-free. A Perfect round with 360º clean design makes space beautiful. Q. What is the role of the Powerful Clean Booster in air purification? The Powerful Clean Booster in an air purifier improves the distribution of purified air in a complete room, making the air circulation effectively reach every corner. Combining the latest fan technology with air purification, fresh air gets delivered as far as 7.5 meters* to ensure big spaces are comfortable and healthy. The booster works in combination with smart circulation and a 70-degree rotation* to allow the air to flow smoothly, reducing stagnant zones.

This continuous rotation and focused airflow help in replacing stale indoor air more quickly with fresh, filtered air than can be done by standard purifiers. The Powerful Clean Booster is thus one step ahead in not only improving the speed and efficiency of air purification but also providing a continuous and comfortable environment that secures clean and breathable air to every corner of the room. *Please refer to product page for more details Q. How does the 6-Step Filtration ensure cleaner and safer air? The LG PuriCare 6-Step Filtration system enables cleaner and safer air by deeply purifying indoor air with advanced 360° filters. Air taken inside the purifier goes through multiple steps, which removes a huge number of different pollutants. The first three steps clean dust and allergens: large dust particles, then ultra-fine dust, and finally allergens for total dust and allergy care. The next three steps go to harmful gases and odors, including common household smells such as ammonia, volatile organic compounds (VOCs) usually found in new furniture or renovations, and pollutants like smog components - SO₂ and NO₂.

This multistep approach means that both particulate matter and harmful gases are effectively captured, and safer, cleaner air is circulated in the room. Comprehensive dust and gas removal is combined in the 6-Step Filtration system to offer reliable protection for a healthier indoor environment. Q. What is the PM 1.0 Smart Sensor & Display in LG PuriCare? PM 1.0 Smart Sensor & Display in LG PuriCare offers real-time monitoring of indoor air quality, detects particulate matter (PM 1.0) and harmful gases. Based on the readings, the purifier adjusts airflow and operates automatically for efficient cleaning. The smart display uses color indicators to show air quality at a glance: Green indicates clean air, and Violet indicates polluted air. This helps users to understand the ambiance at just a glance. It further ensures continuous purification without any need for manual adjustments. Hence, convenience, safety, and healthier indoor environments are guaranteed by this system. With PM 1.0 Smart Sensor & Display, LG PuriCare keeps the air in your home fresh and safe with ease.

Q. What is the Aero V Filter and how does it work? Aero V Filter is a high-efficiency filter created to improve indoor air quality by capturing dust, allergens, and airborne particles. It has a layered structure that ensures fresher and cleaner air in any living space. With 360-degree purification, LG PuriCare™ purifies the air in all directions, ensuring consistent, powerful filtration regardless of the device's placement, to keep the environment healthier and more comfortable for everyone. The Aero V Filter uses multilayer filtration to capture large amounts of dust, fine particles, and the tiniest allergens. It reduces common household odors from cooking and pets, making the indoors more pleasant. Despite its strong filtration, it ensures smooth airflow to maintain consistent performance. Built with sturdy materials, it lasts longer and needs low maintenance. It has a user-friendly design that makes installation easy and replacement when needed.

*The air purifier can purify up to 52.8㎡ with the original filter. Q. How does Dual Airflow and Clean Booster improve air circulation? Dual Airflow and Clean Booster work together to enhance air circulation by allowing clean air to move smoothly through every part of the room. Dual Airflow spreads purified air from top to bottom; this feature avoids stagnant areas and keeps a constant flow throughout. Moreover, the Clean Booster expands this by showcasing purified air up to 5.5 meters to ensure even the far areas receive fresh air constantly. UVnano™ light helps to minimize harmful bacteria on the fan blades for a clean and hygienic airflow. Moreover, the air ionizer neutralizes unwanted airborne substances for a healthy indoor environment. Collectively, these features provide stronger, wider, and more even air circulation, which helps the entire room stay fresh, well-ventilated, and comfortable.

Q. How does the slim and premium design enhance placement flexibility? The slim and premium design enhances placement flexibility by fitting into different spaces, adding elegance to any setting. This shows that the slim profile allows effortless placement even in closed areas, saving up to 40% more floor space compared to standard 360˚ single models. Easy to place anywhere where there is a power source. Its premium finish blends with modern interior spaces, providing a stylish, sleek appearance. The smooth LED display provides clear and simple control without compromising on clean aesthetics, while customized mood lighting lets users adjust brightness and ambience for different environments. Additionally, the Sleep mode's brightness sensor keeps the noise as low as 21dB for a calm and comfortable environment. Overall, these features provide space efficiency, functionality, and aesthetics for any room.

*Floor area: approximately 40.31% reduction in floor area compared to the LG conventional 360 single model. -LG conventional 360 single model (~343mm): approximately 92,401.31mm² -AeroBooster model (~265mm): approximately 55,154.59mm² *It can be turned on or off and the color can be controlled through the ThinQ app. (Initial default setting is 'color change according to overall air quality'). The lighting color option is limited to the colors provided in the ThinQ app. Brightness can be adjusted in 20% increments. Q. What is the One-Touch detachable head feature? The One-Touch detachable head is created for ease of use and convenience. This makes air purifier maintenance simple and efficient. It lets users quickly remove the parts where particles and dust naturally gather. Therefore, allows quick and thorough cleaning without requiring any tools or complicated steps. Not only does it save time, but it also helps to maintain hygiene and keep the purifier working at peak performance. This detachable head supports better airflow, regular cleaning, and long-term durability.

Moreover, the smart filter replacement reminder notifies users when to replace the filter. This helps them plan and avoid decreased efficiency. These features ensure easy maintenance, consistent air purity, and a more reliable and comfortable user experience. Q. What does it mean when an LG product is BAF certified? BAF certification (by the British Allergy Foundation) of any LG product means it is independently tested for its allergy-care effectiveness. So, you can buy with more confidence, knowing it ensures relief from allergens at home. The appliance undergoes strict laboratory tests during the certification process to showcase how it ensures common allergens like fungi, dust mites, pet hair, and mold. LG BAF-certified products, such as the LG PuriCare™ 360º Air Purifier, are designed to create a healthier and safer home by following strict quality and hygiene standards. This certification is proof of verified performance, not just claims. Ensure that the product is BAF-certified to provide your family with an extra layer of care and protection. Q. How does Smart Air Care help on dusty or polluted days? Smart Air Care allows you to breathe clean, fresh air even on dusty or polluted days. With the help of LG's advanced technology and the LG ThinQ™ app , you can easily control your air purifier from anywhere, at any time.

1. Smart Air Care automatically senses indoor air quality changes and adjusts the purifier settings for optimal performance. 2. You can turn on LG PuriCare™ remotely with the LG ThinQ™ app to keep home air clean, even before your arrival. 3. The system provides real-time air quality updates, letting you monitor pollution levels directly from your phone. 4. The advanced filters remove fine dust, harmful particles, and smoke, thereby keeping your family safe and comfortable. 5. On high-pollution days, Smart Air Care increases purification and airflow speed to maintain a fresh, healthy home environment. Q. What are the benefits of a 360-degree air flow system? The 360-degree airflow system ensures that clean air reaches all corners of the room, providing balanced and constant purification for a fresher and healthier living environment. Its innovative design spreads the purified air in room corners, ensuring the space feels consistently clean and fresh.

Circulating air from every angle allows faster removal of pollutants, dust, and allergens by eliminating dead zones that are usually present in one-way systems. This circular flow of air quality keeps the indoor environment consistent. Q. What is a Multi-Filter System in an air purifier? The Multi-Filter System of the air purifier mixes several filtration layers to catch different types of airborne pollutants to ensure healthier and cleaner indoor air. Every filter focuses on particular contaminants: dust, smoke, allergens, odors, and microbes. 1. Pre-Filter: Captures large particles, dust, and pet hair, which prolongs the life of other filters. 2. HEPA Filter: Traps microscopic allergens like pollen, bacteria, and mold spores with up to 99.97% efficiency. 3. Activated Carbon Filter: Absorbs smoke, odors, and harmful gases to enhance freshness in the air. 4. UV or Ionizing Layer (optional): Relieve germs and viruses in the air for extra protection.

5.
